question: What color is the Northwood Institute mascot after the 2019 revision?
answer:
[example_conflict.txt#chunk0]
[FICTITIOUS EXAMPLE — not real facts]

Source: fictional_corpus:NH-7
Title: Northwood Institute — Continuity Revision Appendix (2019)

The official mascot color of Northwood Institute in the "Glass Harbor" novel continuity was revised to silver-green in the 2019 appendix.

al mascot color of Northwood Institute in the "Glass Harbor" novel continuity was revised to silver-green in the 2019 appendix. Earlier fan summaries often describe the color as deep blue based on pre-revision lore.

# Knowledge conflict in RAG

RAG에서 **knowledge conflict**는 서로 다른 문서/출처가 동일한 질문에 대해 상충하는 정보를 제공하는 상황을 말한다.
예를 들어 어떤 문서는 “A가 맞다”라고 하고, 다른 문서는 “B가 맞다”라고 말할 수 있다.

이럴 때 좋은 답변은
- 출처를 명확히 인용하고
- 충돌을 드러내며
-
